SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MARY W. WILSON--OWNER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUNG, CONOR TUNG, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA CARPET, LLC $1,518.74 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,603.74 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
